violations.text: The beer garden bar does not have a hand-washing sink that is conveniently located and/or readily accessible. Hand-washing sinks must be located to allow convenient use by employees in food preparation, food dispensing, and ware-washing areas. Establishment is to install a hand sink for the beer garden area. New Violation. Correct By: 08/20/2025

The presence of small flies is not controlled as evidenced by live activity in the bar area. The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies. New Violation. Correct By: 08/06/2025

Wood is used in the construction of a mounting block for a shelf above the 3-bay sink. Non-food contact surfaces of equipment that are exposed to splash, spillage, or other food soiling or that require frequent cleaning must be constructed of a nonabsorbent and smooth material. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 04/29/2025

The establishment is lacking a 3-bay sink for the beer garden bar area. Establishment is to install a 3-bay sink in the beer garden bar area to facilitate manual warewashing of dishes and utensils. New Violation. Correct By: 08/20/2025

Wood is used in the construction of a mounting block for a shelf above the 3-bay sink. Non-food contact surfaces of equipment that are exposed to splash, spillage, or other food soiling or that require frequent cleaning must be constructed of a nonabsorbent and smooth material. New Violation. Correct By: 04/29/2025
Refrigerator door gaskets were observed in poor repair on the prep unit and cold drawer units. Refrigerator door gaskets shall be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 05/15/2025
The facility is lacking thermo labels or similar internal temperature indicating device for the dish machine at the bar and in the kitchen. New Violation. Correct By: 04/15/2025
The coving in the dishwashing and storage area is in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 05/15/2025

The tiles in the kitchen area were observed with low grout, cracked, and or missing and are in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 10/15/2025
